justified_items.justification: SO-D-03.2.GDPR inherits from SO-GDPR-006 and SO-GDPR-005 (cross-ref). The D-03.2 GDPR access-control obligation is preserved as a cross-reference to SOs that live primarily in D-03.1 (Identity & Authentication Management) and D-03.3 (Authorisation), per the GDPR Art. 32(1)(b) confidentiality-of-processing anchor. No standalone SO is needed in D-03.2 because the access-control dimension is operationalised through identity (D-03.1) and authorisation (D-03.3) controls; D-03.2 surfaces the cross-ref. The inherits_from field already documents this; CORR-029 formalises it as an intentional orphan (cross-ref pattern).

SO-D-03.2.CRA inherits from SO-CRA-016 (partial). The D-03.2 CRA access-control obligation is preserved as a partial-coverage cross-ref to SO-CRA-016 (which lives in D-03.1 — Identity & Authentication). CRA's access-control framing is anchored in Annex I Part I (2)(d) (`identify, authenticate and authorise access to data and functions') but the OJ text does not specify a distinct access-control sub-domain; the obligation is rolled into the identity-management primary in D-03.1. D-03.2 surfaces the partial cross-ref to the primary SO.

justified_items.inherits_from: SO-DORA-013 (partial via Art. 9(4)(e) — D-07.4 primary, D-07.2 partial by inference only)
justified_items.justification: SO-D-07.2.DORA inherits from SO-DORA-013 (partial via Art. 9(4)(e) — D-07.4 primary, D-07.2 partial by inference only). DORA's secure-coding obligation is preserved as a partial-coverage cross-ref to the change-management primary in D-07.4. DORA Art. 9(4)(e) is a change-management policy, not a secure-coding-standards policy; the secure-coding dimension is inferred through the 'tested' and 'assessed' legs of the change-mgmt six-step. No standalone DORA SO for D-07.2 is needed because the OJ text does not prescribe secure-coding standards; the obligation is operationalised through D-07.4.

justified_items.inherits_from: SO-NIS2-017 (partial via the maintenance dimension — `SO-NIS2-017` routes to D-07.3 via Art. 21(2)(e) third clause)
justified_items.justification: SO-D-07.3.NIS2 inherits from SO-NIS2-017 (partial via the maintenance dimension — SO-NIS2-017 routes to D-07.3 via Art. 21(2)(e) third clause). The CI/CD-pipeline-security obligation in NIS2 is preserved as a partial-coverage cross-ref to the maintenance-dimension primary in D-02.2. AEGIS taxonomy §4.1 marks NIS2 as sole authority for D-07.3 (T3-vs-text gap: OJ Art. 21(2)(e) does not mention 'pipeline', 'CI', or 'CD'). The partial coverage is via the maintenance dimension only. No standalone NIS2 SO is needed for D-07.3 because the OJ text does not prescribe CI/CD build-time controls; the obligation is operationalised through D-02.2's maintenance dimension.

justified_items.inherits_from: SO-CRA-009 (partial cross-ref via Annex I Part II (7) — secure update distribution; SO-CRA-009 primary sub-domain is D-02.2 patch management with cross-ref to D-07.3 partial)
justified_items.justification: SO-D-07.3.CRA inherits from SO-CRA-009 (partial cross-ref via Annex I Part II (7) — secure update distribution; SO-CRA-009 primary sub-domain is D-02.2 patch management with cross-ref to D-07.3 partial). The CRA CI/CD-pipeline-security obligation is preserved as a partial-coverage cross-ref to the patch-management primary in D-02.2. CRA covers the product-side update delivery path (Annex I Part II (7)+(8)) only, not CI/CD build-time controls. The CI/CD build-time baseline is supplied by industry frameworks (NIST SP 800-204 / OWASP CI/CD Top 10 / SLSA), not by the OJ text.

SO-D-09.3.CRA inherits from SO-CRA-061. The D-09.3 CRA technical-documentation obligation is preserved as an inheritance from the master technical-documentation SO. The Annex VII §1-§6 technical documentation package spans multiple sub-domains (D-09.3 General Description + D-09.4 Design & Development + D-10.2 Assessment); the primary documentation SO lives in D-09.4 and D-09.3 surfaces a cross-ref. The same documentation record discharges the §1 general-description obligation here and the §2 design-development obligation elsewhere.

justified_items.inherits_from: (out-of-scope as RoPA-equivalent — partial via DORA Art. 9(4)(a) SO-DORA-018 cross)
justified_items.justification: SO-D-09.4.DORA inherits from (out-of-scope as RoPA-equivalent — partial via DORA Art. 9(4)(a) SO-DORA-018 cross). DORA does not impose a Records-of-Processing-Activities (RoPA)-equivalent obligation analogous to GDPR Art. 30. DORA's information-security-policy obligation (Art. 9(4)(a)) is operationalised through SO-DORA-018 (lives in D-09.1 Policies). D-09.4 is therefore a DORA-orphan at the surface level but the DORA-side documentation discipline is captured under the policy layer (D-09.1). No standalone DORA SO for D-09.4 is needed because the OJ text does not impose RoPA-equivalent records on financial entities.

SO-D-09.4.AI_Act inherits from SO-AIACT-009 + SO-AIACT-010 + SO-AIACT-008 (logs). The AI_Act technical-documentation obligation in D-09.4 is preserved as a multi-inheritance from the three primary technical-documentation and log-keeping SOs in D-09.3 / D-09.4 / D-10.2. The AI Act Annex IV technical-documentation package overlaps with the D-09.3 / D-09.4 / D-10.2 sub-domains; the AI_Act side is surfaced as multi-inheritance rather than a standalone SO. The 3-inheritance pattern reflects the AI Act's vertical-stack nature (upstream training, runtime governance, post-market monitoring).

justified_items.sr_title: Adversarial evaluation of GPAI models for systemic risk mitigation
justified_items.justification: 1 SR (SR-AIACT-023) targets D-07.3 but no AI_Act SO exists. Per source MD line 109, 'AI_Act (out-of-scope). AI Act does not impose CI/CD mandate. SR-AIACT-023 (Art. 55(1)(a) GPAI evaluation with adversarial testing) has testing-and-validation dimensions but not CI/CD build-time controls'. SR-AIACT-023 is preserved as a partial-coverage cross-ref (testing-and-validation dimension touches the CI/CD pipeline evidence layer) but is not anchored to a D-07.3 AI_Act SO because AI_Act does not impose a CI/CD-pipeline obligation. CORR-030 may re-anchor SR-AIACT-023 to D-07.2 (testing dimension) or to a D-08.2 (role-specific AI competence) dimension.

4 SRs (SR-CRA-071, SR-CRA-107, SR-CRA-110, SR-CRA-111) target D-08.1 but no CRA SO exists. Per source MD line 39, CRA is 'partial coverage' (Annex II §8 user-instructions only — not workforce awareness). The CRA-side user-instructions obligation is preserved as a partial-coverage cross-ref to the D-08.1 awareness layer; the primary CRA SO is SR-CRA-048 (Annex II §8 user-instructions) which is anchored in D-08.1 for the user-audience dimension only. No standalone CRA SO for D-08.1 is needed because the workforce-awareness obligation is not in the OJ text; Annex II §8 instructions are user-facing, not workforce-facing. CORR-030 will consider whether to create an explicit partial-coverage CRA SO here or to re-anchor these SRs to a different subdomain.

4 SRs (SR-CRA-071, SR-CRA-107, SR-CRA-110, SR-CRA-111) target D-08.1 but no CRA SO exists. Per source MD line 39, CRA is 'partial coverage' (Annex II §8 user-instructions only — not workforce awareness). The CRA-side user-instructions obligation is preserved as a partial-coverage cross-ref to the D-08.1 awareness layer; the primary CRA SO is SR-CRA-048 (Annex II §8 user-instructions) which is anchored in D-08.1 for the user-audience dimension only. No standalone CRA SO for D-08.1 is needed because the workforce-awareness obligation is not in the OJ text; Annex II §8 instructions are user-facing, not workforce-facing. CORR-030 will consider whether to create an explicit partial-coverage CRA SO here or to re-anchor these SRs to a different subdomain.

1 SR (SR-CRA-108) targets D-08.2 but no CRA SO exists. Per source MD line 41, 'CRA's role-specific dimension is integrator-facing (Annex II §8(f)) — B2B audience, not workforce'. SR-CRA-108 (integrator-facing upstream product information delivery) is a partial-coverage cross-ref to the workforce-competence layer. No standalone CRA SO for D-08.2 is needed because CRA does not impose workforce training; it imposes integrator information delivery. CORR-030 will consider whether to add a partial-coverage CRA SO for the integrator dimension.

4 SRs (SR-CRA-071, SR-CRA-107, SR-CRA-110, SR-CRA-111) target D-08.1 but no CRA SO exists. Per source MD line 39, CRA is 'partial coverage' (Annex II §8 user-instructions only — not workforce awareness). The CRA-side user-instructions obligation is preserved as a partial-coverage cross-ref to the D-08.1 awareness layer; the primary CRA SO is SR-CRA-048 (Annex II §8 user-instructions) which is anchored in D-08.1 for the user-audience dimension only. No standalone CRA SO for D-08.1 is needed because the workforce-awareness obligation is not in the OJ text; Annex II §8 instructions are user-facing, not workforce-facing. CORR-030 will consider whether to create an explicit partial-coverage CRA SO here or to re-anchor these SRs to a different subdomain.

4 SRs (SR-CRA-071, SR-CRA-107, SR-CRA-110, SR-CRA-111) target D-08.1 but no CRA SO exists. Per source MD line 39, CRA is 'partial coverage' (Annex II §8 user-instructions only — not workforce awareness). The CRA-side user-instructions obligation is preserved as a partial-coverage cross-ref to the D-08.1 awareness layer; the primary CRA SO is SR-CRA-048 (Annex II §8 user-instructions) which is anchored in D-08.1 for the user-audience dimension only. No standalone CRA SO for D-08.1 is needed because the workforce-awareness obligation is not in the OJ text; Annex II §8 instructions are user-facing, not workforce-facing. CORR-030 will consider whether to create an explicit partial-coverage CRA SO here or to re-anchor these SRs to a different subdomain.

justified_items.sr_title: Secured internal and emergency communications channels
justified_items.justification: 1 SR (SR-NIS2-007) targets D-01.2 but no NIS2 SO exists. Per source MD line 38, NIS2 is 'partially present via SR-NIS2-007 on secured voice/video/text communications — flagged as out-of-scope for D-01.2 standalone by the CRDA taxonomy'. The secured-communications obligation is preserved as a partial-coverage cross-ref. No standalone NIS2 SO for D-01.2 is needed because the data-in-transit obligation does not extend to internal voice/video/text comms (those are in D-03.2 Communications Security). CORR-030 may re-anchor SR-NIS2-007 to D-03.2.

known_gaps.note: 0 SO entries have no SR. These may be intentional (framework coverage without specific obligation) or may need new SRs. See CORR-030 scope.
